---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that isn't working correctly
labels: bug
---

## Description

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Command

The exact command you ran:

```
pathfinder ...
```

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include the full output, especially any error messages.

## Environment

- OS and architecture:
- Pathfinder version (`pathfinder --version`):

## Additional context

Any other relevant information. If the bug involves incorrect game data (wrong recipe amounts, missing items, etc.) please include the in-game values you observed.
